snippet.title: BR540 Extrait x Creed Absolu Aventus ASMR
snippet.description:
Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait. Creed Absolu Aventus. Two of the most iconic fragrances ever made — $1,000 and $610 full bottle respectively. Both decanted fresh.
BR540 Extrait hits harder than the EDP — deeper, richer, more resinous. Absolu Aventus is the pinnacle of the Aventus line. Pineapple, birch, musk — refined to its absolute best.
Decants available now at primedecants.com
